title: WU 2.2-6: Sweep + tag m1-phase02-2
description: Final verification. Clean build, capture exact zx80 score headline (target ~0.6+ with opcodes count higher by 88). Sanity-check FUSE 80 case (ADD A,B) is not in failures — if it is, afterAdd flag computation has a bug. Tag m1-phase02-2. Plan WU 2.2-6 section. Epic: zx80-fg9.

title: WU 2.2-5: INC and DEC (16 opcodes)
description: Four Op classes: IncReg(dst), IncHlMem, DecReg(dst), DecHlMem. 7 + 1 + 7 + 1 = 16 opcodes. CRITICAL: C flag preserved (unique to INC/DEC). N cleared by INC, set by DEC. 4 T-states for register variants, 11 for (HL). Extend AluOps fragment + AluOpsTest. ~19 new tests. Plan WU 2.2-5 section. Epic: zx80-fg9.

title: WU 2.2-4: AluAImm (8 ALU A,n immediate opcodes)
description: AluAImm(op) covers 8 opcodes: 0xC6, 0xCE, 0xD6, 0xDE, 0xE6, 0xEE, 0xF6, 0xFE. 7 T-states, operandLength=1. Reads immediate from mem[pc+1]. Extend AluOps fragment + AluOpsTest. ~5 new tests. Plan WU 2.2-4 section. Epic: zx80-fg9.

title: WU 2.2-3: AluAFromHl (8 ALU A,(HL) opcodes)
description: AluAFromHl(op) covers 8 opcodes: 0x86, 0x8E, 0x96, 0x9E, 0xA6, 0xAE, 0xB6, 0xBE. 7 T-states. Reads byte at HL as second operand. Extend AluOps fragment + AluOpsTest. ~5 new tests. Plan WU 2.2-3 section. Epic: zx80-fg9.

title: WU 2.2-1: Flags helpers + AluResult + AluOp enum
description: Foundation for Phase 2.2. Add AluResult data class. Extend Flags object with afterAdd/afterSub/afterAnd/afterOr/afterXor/afterInc/afterDec helpers + parity utility, all returning AluResult. Add AluOp enum (ADD/ADC/SUB/SBC/AND/OR/XOR/CP) with apply(a,b,oldF) dispatch + fromBits(bits) helper (note Z80 ooo encoding: XOR at 5, OR at 6). ~53 new tests. No Op classes yet. Plan WU 2.2-1 section. Epic: zx80-fg9.

title: WU 2.2-2: AluAReg (56 ALU A,r opcodes in 0x80-0xBF block)
description: Big WU. AluAReg parameterized over (op: AluOp, src: Reg) covers 56 opcodes (rrr=110 (HL) variants skipped, handled later). CP correctly leaves A unchanged. Create AluOps fragment + wire into OpTableBuilder. ~13 new tests. Plan WU 2.2-2 section. Epic: zx80-fg9.

title: Phase 2.2: 8-bit ALU + INC/DEC
description: Implement the 8-bit Z80 ALU family on A (ADD/ADC/SUB/SBC/AND/OR/XOR/CP across reg/(HL)/immediate sources) plus INC/DEC for 8-bit operands. ~88 new opcode positions across 7 Op classes. First batch with real flag computation. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-2-arithmetic-design.md. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-2-arithmetic.md. Phase 2.1b (epic zx80-4gm) must complete first. End milestone tag: m1-phase02-2.

title: WU 2.1b-6: Sweep + tag m1-phase02-1b
description: Final verification. Clean build, capture exact zx80 score headline (target ~SCORE: 0.4xx with opcodes 94/1792). Sanity-check FUSE 40 case (LD B,B) is not in failures. Tag m1-phase02-1b. Plan WU 2.1b-6 section. Epic: zx80-4gm.

title: WU 2.1b-5: LD with memory addresses (8 opcodes)
description: LdAFromBcDe + LdBcDeFromA parameterized over RegPair.BC/DE (validates pair). LdAFromAddr (LD A,(nn) at 0x3A), LdAddrFromA (LD (nn),A at 0x32), LdHlFromAddr (LD HL,(nn) at 0x2A), LdAddrFromHl (LD (nn),HL at 0x22). Uses Memory.readWord/writeWord. ~22 new tests. Plan WU 2.1b-5 section. Epic: zx80-4gm.

title: WU 2.1b-4: LD rr,nn family (16-bit immediate to pair) + Memory.readWord helpers
description: 4 opcodes (LD BC/DE/HL/SP, nn at 0x01/0x11/0x21/0x31). LdPairImm parameterized over RegPair. Also: add Memory.readWord(addr) and Memory.writeWord(addr, value) helpers (little-endian; will be used here and by WU 2.1b-5's address ops). ~9 new tests. Plan WU 2.1b-4 section. Epic: zx80-4gm.

title: WU 2.1b-3: LD r,n family (immediate to register + LD (HL),n)
description: 8 opcode positions. LdRegImm(dst) parameterized for 7 LD r,n opcodes (0x06, 0x0E, 0x16, 0x1E, 0x26, 0x2E, 0x3E). LdHlMemImm singleton for LD (HL),n (0x36). Extend LdOps fragment + LdOpsTest. ~10 new tests. Plan WU 2.1b-3 section. Epic: zx80-4gm.

title: WU 2.1b-2: LD r,r' family (the 0x40-0x7F block)
description: 63 opcode positions: LdRegReg parameterized over (src, dst) covers 49 reg-to-reg combos; LdRegFromHl(dst) covers the 7 LD r,(HL) variants; LdHlFromReg(src) covers the 7 LD (HL),r variants. HALT slot at 0x76 must be skipped (collision with MiscOps). Also: create LdOps fragment + wire into OpTableBuilder. ~17 new tests. Plan WU 2.1b-2 section. Epic: zx80-4gm.

title: WU 2.1b-1: Reg.fromBits + RegPair foundation
description: Foundation for Phase 2.1b LD family. Add Reg.fromBits(bits) companion helper (maps Z80 r-field 0..7 to Reg, throws on bits=6 = (HL)). Create new RegPair enum (BC/DE/HL/SP) with read/write/fromBits. Update Op.operandLength KDoc to clarify 'informational; Op owns PC advance'. No new Op classes; ~9 new tests. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-1b-ld-family.md WU 2.1b-1 section. Epic: zx80-4gm.

title: Phase 2.1b: LD instruction family
description: Implement the entire Z80 LD instruction family — ~80 new opcode positions across ~12 Op classes. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-1b-ld-family-design.md. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-02-zx80-m1-phase2-1b-ld-family.md. After this epic completes, opcodes count climbs from 11 to ~94 and composite score moves from 0.106 to roughly 0.35-0.50. End milestone tag: m1-phase02-1b.
